name: ArXiv Research
description: Search and retrieve academic papers from ArXiv.org across Physics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Quantitative Biology, Statistics, and more. Completely free — no API key required.

tools_summary.name: search_papers
tools_summary.description: Search ArXiv for academic papers by keyword, author, or topic

tools_summary.name: get_paper
tools_summary.description: Retrieve full metadata and abstract for a specific ArXiv paper by ID (e.g. 2310.01234)

tools_summary.name: get_recent_papers
tools_summary.description: Get the most recent submissions in a category (cs.AI, math.ST, etc.)

tools_summary.name: search_by_author
tools_summary.description: Find all ArXiv papers by a specific author

tools_summary.name: get_paper_categories
tools_summary.description: List all available ArXiv subject categories

setup_instructions: No setup required. ArXiv provides a free, unauthenticated public API. Just enable this plugin and start searching.
